backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend with user profiles, feedback (submit/approve/reject/query), appointments, and blocked dates, using role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the admin-only dashboard restriction was removed so any user with non-empty credentials can access appointments and feedback sections, listing the affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing each component, page, hook, and style file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for light and dark themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module; titled 'Luxyle'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with routes for home, contact, and admin pages inside a shared Layout (Header/Footer), plus QueryClientProvider and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section component rendering a split layout with a brand image, story text, gold divider, and three brand pillar cards (Premium Quality, Exclusive Curation, Personal Service).
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI component showing a shield icon, heading, message, and a 'Return Home' navigation button.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Dashboard login form that accepts any non-empty username and password (no real credential validation), calls onSuccess(username) after a brief loading delay, and includes a show/hide password toggle.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: A form component for booking showroom appointments, allowing users to select a date, time slot, and enter contact details, with blocked-date validation and a success confirmation view.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays a responsive image gallery grid of 8 collection items with hover overlays and a lightbox viewer supporting previous/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCollecti: Shows a 4-item featured collection grid with hover effects that scrolls to the full collection section when clicked.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A review submission form with name, star rating, and text fields that posts feedback via a mutation hook and shows a confirmation state on success.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, and contact/location details, including an Instagram link and Google Maps link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with scroll-aware styling, desktop and mobile nav menus, smooth-scroll section links, and a Book Appointment CTA button.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for the Luxyle luxury interior décor brand, featuring a background image with overlays, a 'Book Appointment' scroll button, and a Google Maps directions link.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays a grid of client reviews combining hardcoded seed reviews with dynamically fetched approved feedback from the backend, with loading skeletons while data is pending.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching/submitting/approving/rejecting feedback, managing appointments, and retrieving dashboard data.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a luxury color palette (gold, ivory, royal blue), and reusable utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and the InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing feedback and appointments (approve/reject), blocked dates, and a login form gated by session storage. Includes sub-components for star ratings, status badges, and per-tab CRUD UI.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying location, hours, phone, and Instagram cards alongside an embedded Google Map and an appointment booking component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the hero, stats bar, about, collection gallery, reviews, feedback form, and appointment booking sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), a luxury color palette (gold, ivory, royal-blue), box shadows, and fade animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Luxyle website's existing features, pending action requests (AR-1 through AR-5), and architectural notes about open dashboard access.
